use_cases: Call-to-action buttons in landing pages and marketing sites
Navigation links to product pages or checkout flows
Interactive buttons with animated feedback for user engagement
Primary action triggers in forms and conversion funnels
Animated CTA buttons in hero sections and banners
ai_summary: An animated arrow button component featuring a dynamic dot-based icon animation that creates an arrow effect on hover. The button uses CSS custom properties for index-based dot positioning and includes layered background and inner elements for visual depth. Designed as a reusable CTA component suitable for various web applications requiring interactive button elements.
